## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Monograph's content strategy, SEO performance, and GrowthX's deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is creating custom Looker dashboards for Monograph, including SEO keyword tracking](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [A comprehensive LLMs.txt file was generated for Monograph's website, pending review and edits](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [New content strategy discussed for repurposing webinar content across multiple sessions](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [GrowthX is personally overseeing Monograph's account to ensure high-quality deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2305.0)

## Topics

### Looker Dashboard Access and Customization

  - [GrowthX to provide Monograph team access to Looker dashboards immediately after the call](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Custom pane for SEO keyword tracking to be added to the dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Dashboard includes overall traffic, non-branded traffic, conversion events, and LLM referrer data](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Cohort analysis shows performance of GrowthX content vs. non-GrowthX content](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Scrunch Dashboard and Prompt Analysis

  - [Scrunch dashboard shows Monograph's presence and sentiment based on custom prompts](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [New cluster of solution-seeker prompts added to gauge Monograph's visibility in broader contexts](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Dashboard helps identify content gaps and opportunities for new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [GrowthX analyzed Reddit and other forums to generate relevant prompts; open to adding more sources](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

### LLMs.txt File Review and Implementation

  - [Comprehensive LLMs.txt file generated for Monograph's website](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [File structure includes company brief, key metrics, product features, and other relevant information](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [Monograph team to review and edit the file in a shared Notion document](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to handle the implementation in Webflow once approved](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)

### Content Strategy and Webinar Repurposing

  - [Discussion on how to leverage webinar content for SEO and Geo optimization](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Proposal to analyze six webinar transcripts to identify overlapping topics and create multi-faceted content](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
  - [Opportunity to surface new topics from webinars, especially in areas where Monograph is expanding (e.g., architect-engineer collaboration)](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Potential to scale this approach to older webinar content from previous years](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)

### Content Production Pipeline

  - [Current status: 38 approved topics to start, 45 in backlog](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2186.0)
  - [Agreement to review and approve new topics when approved list drops to around 20](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Monograph team to handle urgent content needs internally](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)
  - [Robert to approve topics in Content OS, with Gary doing final copy approval](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide Looker dashboard access and add SEO keyword tracking pane](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Convert LLMs.txt file to editable Notion document for Monograph team review](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Monograph to share six webinar transcripts for content repurposing analysis](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver new batch of content within the next day](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Continue working through approved content topics (38 currently)](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2169.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement LLMs.txt file in Webflow once approved](https://fathom.video/share/jmJpaekZymzTUvHCrgFcy3F9WMJU4qdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
